tool_output.output:
Based on the provided text, here are the exact tables and figures detailing Segment Adjusted EBITDA and capital expenditures by segment for the three months ended March 31, 2026.

### Capital Expenditures by Segment
The following table presents capital expenditures by segment:

| (in millions) | Three Months Ended March 31, 2026 | Three Months Ended March 31, 2025 | Year Ended December 31, 2025 | Year Ended December 31, 2024 | Year Ended December 31, 2023 |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| Space | $1,052 | $759 | $3,832 | $2,032 | $1,497 |
| Connectivity | 1,332 | 814 | 4,178 | 3,498 | 2,455 |
| AI | 7,723 | 2,567 | 12,727 | 5,633 | 463 |
| **Total Capital Expenditures** | **$10,107** | **$4,140** | **$20,737** | **$11,163** | **$4,415** |

*Note: Space capital expenditures for the three months ended March 31, 2026 increased $293 million to $1,052 million compared to $759 million for the three months ended March 31, 2025. The increase was primarily driven by increased investment in the launch site infrastructure for Starship.*

---

### Segment Adjusted EBITDA Reconciliation
The following table sets forth a reconciliation of Income (loss) from operations for each segment to Segment Adjusted EBITDA for the three months ended March 31, 2026:

| (in millions) | Space | Connectivity | AI | Total Reportable Segments |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| Income (loss) from operations | $(662) | $1,188 | $(2,469) | $(1,943) |
| Add: | | | | |
| Depreciation and amortization | 166 | 783 | 1,493 | 2,442 |
| Share-based compensation | 145 | 116 | 378 | 639 |
| Restructuring charges | — | — | (11) | (11) |
| **Segment Adjusted EBITDA** | **$(351)** | **$2,087** | **$(609)** | **$1,127** |

---
